objective: Fix `HMM.backward` so padded suffix scan steps preserve `beta_prev` rather than replacing the backward carry with zeros, then add a regression proving that `forward_backward(obs, length=L)` matches `forward_backward(obs[:L])` on the valid prefix and log-likelihood.
completion_criteria: Run the issue's deterministic two-state HMM reproduction and compare padded versus sliced observations for the first L alpha, beta, and posterior values plus log-likelihood. Add edge cases for full length and a one-step valid prefix and run the focused HMM test suite.
non_results: Finite computation outside its stated range is not a proof of a universal claim.
A candidate is not a solution until independent and human review are recorded.
Restating a known reduction, checking examples, or giving an unproved key lemma is not terminal success.

baseline_review.requirement: Audit exact statement/status, prior work, established facts, ruled-out routes, open leads, tools, and acceptance path before technical research.

synthesis_summary: A review-ready patch changes padded HMM backward steps from a zero carry to beta_prev and adds a regression comparing padded and sliced alpha, beta, posterior, and log-likelihood for L=1, 3, and 5. The pristine baseline failed as predicted; the patched issue reproduction, focused suite, repository regression, and independent NumPy/JIT checker passed. Evidence was repackaged without workspace virtualenv symlinks and bound by a checksum manifest.

established_facts.claim: Upstream main and the pinned checkout were both 6701435c2b0796ec2d6dddf11bae0df615a62017 during the 2026-07-22 closeout.
established_facts.evidence: git ls-remote and local rev-parse recorded in artifacts/run2-validation.md.
established_facts.scope: google-deepmind/distrax refs/heads/main at the status-check time.

established_facts.claim: The zero-carry implementation fails the issue's padded-prefix beta invariant.
established_facts.scope: The sourced two-state Gaussian HMM, five observations, valid length 3.

established_facts.claim: The carry-preservation patch satisfies padded-versus-sliced equality in the added regression.
established_facts.scope: Valid lengths 1, 3, and 5 across nine variants available on the single-device host.

established_facts.claim: Patched results agree with a separate NumPy recurrence.
established_facts.scope: Two fixed HMM parameterizations at valid lengths 1, 3, and 5.

established_facts.claim: The decisive evidence set is hash-consistent.
established_facts.evidence: sha256sum -c artifacts/run2-evidence.sha256 returned OK for every entry.
established_facts.scope: The 15 immutable paths listed in artifacts/run2-evidence.sha256.

strategies.title: Replace the padded HMM backward-scan zero carry with beta_prev, add a Chex padded-prefix regression, and validate through failing-before/passing-after reproduction plus an independent NumPy recurrence.
strategies.mechanism: Freeze the reverse-scan carry during padded suffix steps so the terminal all-ones beta reaches the final valid timestep unchanged.
strategies.hypothesis: Preserving beta_prev when t > length makes forward_backward(obs, length=L) equal forward_backward(obs[:L]) on valid alpha, beta, posterior, and log-likelihood without regressing existing forward-backward behavior.
strategies.discriminating_test: Run the issue's two-state, five-observation witness before and after the one-line change, then compare patched results with sliced inference and a separately implemented NumPy recurrence at L=1, 3, and 5.
strategies.blocker: Only external authority and infrastructure remain: isolated human review, an authorized fork/PR, full upstream CI, multi-device execution, and maintainer acceptance.
strategies.reopen_condition: Reopen implementation research only if upstream source changes, CI fails, a maintainer rejects the carry semantics, or a reproducible counterexample violates valid-prefix equality.

open_leads.description: Upstream pull request and CI validation.
open_leads.rationale: This is the acceptance path for the completed local candidate.
open_leads.next_experiment: Verify artifacts/run2-evidence.sha256, apply the patch in an authorized fork, and run upstream CI.

open_leads.rationale: Fifteen complete-selection and three regression-only pmap variants skipped because the host exposes one device.
open_leads.next_experiment: Run the focused regression on a host exposing multiple JAX devices.

ruled_out.claim_or_route: Replacing the reverse-scan carry with zeros during suffix padding preserves valid-prefix marginals.
ruled_out.scope: Issue #337's two-state reproduction at valid length 3.
ruled_out.reason: Every valid padded beta entry becomes zero and differs from sliced inference.
ruled_out.reopen_condition: A documented API contract explicitly rejecting padded-versus-sliced valid-prefix equivalence.

ruled_out.claim_or_route: Likelihood equality alone is sufficient to validate the padding fix.
ruled_out.reason: The baseline likelihood already matches while beta and posterior are wrong.
ruled_out.reopen_condition: None; future checks must include beta and posterior, with alpha retained as a regression control.

ruled_out.claim_or_route: A workspace-local virtualenv can be included in the immutable evidence receipt.
ruled_out.reason: Four virtualenv symlinks invalidated the receipt despite matching decisive artifact hashes.
ruled_out.reopen_condition: A receipt format that explicitly permits and safely resolves external toolchain symlinks.

next_session.objective: Obtain independent human review and upstream validation of the completed candidate.
next_session.first_action: Run `sha256sum -c artifacts/run2-evidence.sha256`, then review artifacts/run2-validation.md and patches/0001-preserve-hmm-backward-carry.patch.
next_session.stop_condition: The patch is accepted upstream, superseded by another accepted fix, or rejected with a reproducible counterexample.

tactical_memory.current_bottleneck: The mechanism and local patch are complete; remaining uncertainty is external review, full CI, and multi-device validation.

failure_signatures.signature: Replacing a reverse-scan carry with zeros during suffix padding poisons every earlier valid beta and posterior value.

reusable_assets.name: Independent NumPy/JIT checker
reusable_assets.use: Validate padded, sliced, and independently implemented recurrences.

reusable_assets.name: Hash-bound review packet
reusable_assets.use: Permit isolated reproduction and human review without the removed workspace virtualenv.

constraints_learned.constraint: The carry must be preserved only for t > length; using t >= length would skip the recurrence required immediately before the last valid state.
constraints_learned.evidence: The L=1 and L=3 padded-versus-sliced regression cases pass with the strict inequality.

constraints_learned.constraint: The independent oracle must reproduce Distrax's 1e-15 normalization-floor semantics to avoid mistaking cross-dtype underflow for padding behavior.
constraints_learned.scope: NumPy comparisons involving extreme Gaussian observations.
constraints_learned.evidence: artifacts/check_hmm_padding_numpy.py and preserved negative experiments 20260722-204627-b87c9f and 20260722-204707-dec573

decision_history.prediction: The pristine implementation will fail at beta, while preserving beta_prev will make all valid-prefix comparisons pass for L=1, 3, and T.
decision_history.observation: The baseline produced zeros for all six valid beta entries. The patched issue replay, nine available regression variants, and all six NumPy/JIT profiles passed.
decision_history.surprise: The prior run's only contribution-gate failure was evidence packaging from four workspace-local virtualenv symlinks; the decisive artifact hashes were valid.
decision_history.next_discriminator: Human review followed by upstream CI; rerun mechanism discovery only if review or CI supplies a counterexample.

reduction_ledger.ambient_space: All finite-state HMM parameters, observation sequences, sequence lengths, dtypes, and JAX execution environments.
reduction_ledger.represented_space_before: Unbounded; one sourced two-state counterexample at L=3.
reduction_ledger.eliminated_or_quotiented: No global family was eliminated. The verification surface was partitioned into boundary L=1, interior L=3, and unpadded L=T profiles.
reduction_ledger.represented_space_after: Two fixed HMM parameterizations at L=1, 3, and 5, plus the repository's focused forward-backward cases on one CPU device.
reduction_ledger.coverage_scope: The issue reproduction, one three-state control, lengths 1/3/5, eager/JIT/device variants available on a single-device host, and existing forward-backward tests.
reduction_ledger.soundness_basis: Direct equality with sliced inference and an independent NumPy implementation using Distrax's normalization-floor semantics.
reduction_ledger.remaining_unknown: Full repository CI, multi-device pmap behavior, additional dtypes or distributions, and maintainer acceptance.
reduction_ledger.next_bulk_elimination: Run upstream CI and the skipped multi-device variants; no further local parameter sweep is justified before review.

prior_art_decisions.exact_delta: Issue #337 identifies the defect and suggests preserving the carry. This contribution supplies the exact patch, repository regression over alpha/beta/posterior/log-likelihood and L=1/3/5, independent NumPy/JIT checker, pinned dependencies, and hash-recorded results.
prior_art_decisions.duplicate_risk: An unlinked or newly opened upstream pull request could independently implement the same one-line fix.
prior_art_decisions.comparison_test: Repository-scoped GitHub pull-request search for 337 plus issue-event inspection, followed by byte comparison with current upstream main.
